action_set_definitions.name: get_system_inventory
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves a list of all ventilation infrastructure components including their IDs, locations, and static specifications (e.g., depth, rated max RPM).

category.description: The type of equipment to list.

action_set_definitions.name: get_sensor_readings
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves current real-time data for specific sensor or component IDs, including gas levels, airflow velocities, and operational parameters.

ids.description: List of equipment or sensor IDs to query.

action_set_definitions.name: get_aggregate_metrics
action_set_definitions.description: Provides global system metrics including total mine-wide power consumption and total return airflow volume.

action_set_definitions.name: adjust_fan_speed
action_set_definitions.description: Modifies the RPM of a specific ventilation fan.

fan_id.description: ID of the fan to adjust.

action_set_definitions.name: adjust_regulator_opening
action_set_definitions.description: Changes the opening percentage of a specific ventilation regulator door.

regulator_id.description: ID of the regulator to adjust.

state_description.fan_states: Current operational parameters for all ventilation fans, including speed (RPM) and power status.
state_description.gas_concentrations: Current levels of CH4 (%), CO (ppm), and O2 (%) measured at various sensor nodes.
state_description.airflow_data: Airflow velocity (m/s) and volumetric flow rate (m3/s) at specific intake and return points.
state_description.regulator_positions: The opening percentage (0-100) of ventilation doors and air regulators.
state_description.total_power_consumption: Total instantaneous power consumption of the ventilation system in kilowatts (kW).
